function loadCart(){try{const saved=localStorage.getItem(CART_KEY);const ts=localStorage.getItem(CART_TS_KEY);if(!saved)return[];// If cart is older than 6 hours, clear it — prices may have changed

:i);}return[...prev,{productId:product.id,productName:product.name,price:product.price,// today's live price
